questions.question: When is the ‘Audit Diwas’ celebrated in India?
questions.explanation: Audit Diwas is celebrated on November 16 to mark the origin of the institution of CAG and the contribution it has made to the governance, transparency and accountability. Vice President Jagdeep Dhankhar inaugurated the second Audit Diwas celebrations. The Comptroller and Auditor General of India (CAG) plays a critical role as external auditor at various UN organisations.

questions.question: In the Battle of Walong, which was commemorated recently, India defeated which army?
questions.explanation: Indian Army celebrated Diamond Jubilee of the Battle of Walong, in which the Indian Army defeated the Chinese army in Eastern Arunachal Pradesh. During the 1962 Sino – India war, the Indian Army defeated the Chinese in the Battle of Walong. The Indian Army halted the advancing PLA soldiers for 27 days which forced them to sidestep its reserve division.

questions.question: Which state hosted the 2nd edition of North East Olympic Games in 2022?
questions.explanation: The 2nd edition of North East Olympic Games was hosted by Shilllong, Meghalaya in 2022. Manipur emerged as the overall team champion with a total of 240 medals Assam took the second spot with a total of 203 medals followed by Arunachal Pradesh. In the week long event, about 3000 participants from all around the North East states competed in 18 disciplines. Nagaland will host the next edition of the Northeast Olympic Games.

questions.question: Uda Devi Pasi, an Indian freedom fighter, was from which present day state?
questions.explanation: Uda Devi Pasi was an Indian women freedom fighter who participated in Indian Rebellion of 1857, against the British East India Company. She was a member of the women’s squad of Wajid Ali Shah, the sixth Nawab of Awadh. Awadh or Oudh is the present day Uttar Pradesh. She was a leader who managed to mobilise people including Dalit women to take up arms against the British.

questions.question: Kameng Hydro Power Station, which was inaugurated recently, is located in which state/UT?
questions.explanation: Prime Minister Narendra Modi inaugurated the 600 MW Kameng Hydro Power Station in Arunachal Pradesh. It is the biggest Hydro Power Project implemented by NEEPCO Ltd, a Mini Ratna Power PSU under Ministry of Power. This is also the sixth hydro power plant in the North East. Generation of 3353 Million Units annually from the project will make Arunachal Pradesh a power surplus state, also contributing to the National Grid.

questions.question: Who is the recipient of the Gandhi Mandela Award in 2022?
questions.explanation: Tibetan spiritual leader Dalai Lama (87) was given the Gandhi Mandela Award of Gandhi Mandela Foundation in Dharamsala, Himachal Pradesh. The State Governor Rajendra Vishwanath Arlekar felicitated Tibetan spiritual leader the Dalai Lama with the Gandhi Mandela Award. The award, constituted by the Gandhi Mandela Foundation, recognised the persons who promote the values and ideals of Mahatma Gandhi and Nelson Mandela in the interest of global peace and freedom.

questions.question: When is the ‘World Fisheries Day’ celebrated?
questions.explanation: ‘World Fisheries Day’ is celebrated on November 21 every year to demonstrate solidarity with all fisher folk, fish farmers and stakeholders. It started in 1997 where ‘World Forum of Fish Harvesters & Fish Workers’ met at New Delhi leading to formation of the ‘World Fisheries Forum’ with representatives from 18 countries.

questions.question: Which company won the ‘Startup of the Year award at Economic Times Startup Awards’?
questions.explanation: Online payments firm Razorpay was awarded the ‘Startup of the Year award’ at Economic Times Startup Awards. Razorpay was awarded this recognition for its success in building a strong disruptive digital payment ecosystem for banks and businesses in India.

questions.question: Which racing driver won the ‘Abu Dhabi Grand Prix’ Title in 2022?
questions.explanation: Red Bull driver and World Champion Max Verstappen clinched his 15th Grand Prix win of 2022 in the Abu Dhabi Grand Prix, which is the final race of the Formula 1 2022 season. Charles Leclerc finished second in the race, followed by Sergio Perez. Seven-time world champion Lewis Hamilton failed to finish the race because of a mechanical failure. Sebastian Vettel announced his retirement from F1, making the Abu Dhabi GP the final race of his career.

questions.question: What is the campaign of the ‘World Toilet Day 2022’?
questions.explanation: World Toilet Day is celebrated annually on 19 November to inspire action to tackle the global sanitation crisis and help achieve Sustainable Development Goal 6 (SDG 6), which promises sanitation for all by 2030. World Toilet Day 2022 focuses on the impact of the sanitation crisis on groundwater. The 2022 campaign ‘Making the invisible visible’ explores how inadequate sanitation systems spread human waste into rivers, lakes and soil, polluting underground water resources.
